_README: === LIFELINE CHURCH WEBSITE CONFIGURATION ===  Edit this file to change anything on the website. No coding knowledge needed! Just change the text between the quotation marks and save the file.

colors._help: Change these to change the colors across the entire website. Use any CSS color (e.g. #3d6b8e, rgb(61,107,142), etc). Google 'color picker' to find colors you like.

churchInfo._help: Basic church information used across the website.
churchInfo.name: Lifeline Church Atlanta
churchInfo.tagline: Reaching the unreached, Churching the unchurched
churchInfo.serviceDescription: Join us for our Telugu and English Worship Service every Sunday at 5 PM

welcomeSection._help: Content for the 'Welcome to Lifeline' section (the map section).
welcomeSection.heading: WELCOME TO LIFELINE
welcomeSection.scheduleText: 5 PM — Telugu and English Worship Service

aboutUs.heading: About Us
aboutUs.text: Lifeline Church is a group of Jesus followers who love God and care about people. We strive to be a channel of Jesus' love to the hurting world around us. Our goal is to build people's spiritual lives and meet their needs through worship, prayer, discipleship, teaching, missions, and church planting.

photosSection._help: Content for the photos section heading.
photosSection.heading: Our Photos
photosSection.description: Explore moments from our services, events, and community activities.

events._help: Upcoming events. Add or remove events freely — the website will space them automatically. Copy the format below to add a new event. Delete an event block (including the curly braces) to remove it.
events.heading: Upcoming Events

list.title: Sunday Service
list.description: Join us every Sunday at 5 PM for worship, message and fellowship.

list.title: Men's Fellowship
list.description: Wednesday Bible study and prayer for men at 9 PM.

list.title: Women's Fellowship
list.description: Worship Service at 6:30 AM. Intercessory prayer from 8 AM - 10 PM, 11 AM - 12 PM, 2 PM - 3 PM, 6 PM - 7 PM

list.title: Women's Conference
list.description: Worship Service for Women on September 13th

ministries._help: Content for the 'Happening at Lifeline' section with the video embed.
ministries.heading: Happening at Lifeline
ministries.text: Stay connected with our latest sermons and special events. Watch our live stream every Sunday to be a part of our worship experience, no matter where you are.

liveVideoEmbed._help: The YouTube video ID for the embedded video in the Ministries section. To get the video ID: go to the YouTube video, look at the URL — the ID is the part after 'v=' (e.g., for youtube.com/watch?v=81lfRlDkFsc the ID is 81lfRlDkFsc).

give.heading: Give
give.description: Your generous support helps us reach the unreached with the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

options.title: By Check
options.text: Make payable to 'Lifeline Church' and mail to our address.

socialLinks._help: Links to your social media pages. These appear in the footer.

mapEmbed._help: Google Maps embed URL. To get a new one: go to Google Maps, find your location, click 'Share' > 'Embed a map', and copy the URL from the src attribute.

landingSlideshow._help: Settings for the background slideshow on the homepage hero. 'images' is a list of image file paths in the 'land_imgs' folder. 'intervalMs' is how long each image shows (in milliseconds — 6000 = 6 seconds).
